subject: Re: FT Real Estate, Inc.
body:
vi residents


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, May 4, 2007 10:44:23 AM
Subject: FT Real Estate, Inc.


I need to appoint directors and officers of FT Real Estate, Inc.  Do you want to limit the officers and directors to USVI residents?  Which is what we mostly did for FTC (GM is a director--and as you know, she is no longer a USVI person); or, on the theory that this is a separate business endeavor not a related FTC entity, should we have Rich and I as directors and officers, with you as President?  Please advise.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
 
------------------------------

Subject: FT Real Estate, Inc.

I need to appoint directors and officers of FT Real Estate, Inc.  Do you want to limit the officers and directors to USVI residents?  Which is what we mostly did for FTC (GM is a director--and as you know, she is no longer a USVI person); or, on the theory that this is a separate business endeavor not a related FTC entity, should we have Rich and I as directors and officers, with you as President?  Please advise.
